film.title: Hungama
film.overview: A case of mistaken identities featuring a young woman, an electronics business owner and an aspiring musician which leads to chaotic yet hilarious situations.

dialogues.dialogue: There wasn't a day when my father's knife did not taste blood! His father was a butcher? - You are insulting me! You're still here? Shameless man, go away I'll go away! But I will surely come back! Listen... - What?

I request you one last time, sir. Please don't stop me give my Anjali to me with your blessings, Don't you feel any shame at all? A boy and a girl love each other... so what's there to be ashamed about? A girl? - You think she's an old hag?

give my Anjali to me with your blessings, Don't you feel any shame at all? A boy and a girl love each other... so what's there to be ashamed about? A girl? - You think she's an old hag? I get it! You've fallen in love with Anjali's riches!
dialogues.cause_raw: accused of being interested in girl's wealth
